page.title: Charts & Diagrams Showcase
page.description: Complete demonstration combining charts and Mermaid diagrams in a tabbed interface
page.author: Claude Code

props.content: This comprehensive showcase demonstrates all visualization capabilities: interactive charts, technical diagrams, and combined layouts. Navigate through tabs to explore different use cases.
Real-time business metrics and KPIs at a glance.

### Year-over-Year Comparison
Compare current performance against previous year.

### High-Level System Design
Microservices architecture with event-driven communication.

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    subgraph Client["Client Layer"]
        Web[Web Application]
        Mobile[Mobile App]
        Admin[Admin Portal]
    end
    
    subgraph Gateway["API Gateway Layer"]
        APIGW[API Gateway]
        Auth[Auth Service]
        RateLimit[Rate Limiter]
    end
    
    subgraph Services["Microservices Layer"]
        UserSvc[User Service]
        OrderSvc[Order Service]
        ProductSvc[Product Service]
        PaymentSvc[Payment Service]
        NotifSvc[Notification Service]
    end
    
    subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
        UserDB[(User DB)]
        OrderDB[(Order DB)]
        ProductDB[(Product DB)]
        Cache[(Redis Cache)]
        Queue[Message Queue]
    end
    
    subgraph External["External Services"]
        PayGW[Payment Gateway]
        Email[Email Provider]
        SMS[SMS Gateway]
    end
    
    Web --> APIGW
    Mobile --> APIGW
    Admin --> APIGW
    
    APIGW --> Auth
    APIGW --> RateLimit
    APIGW --> UserSvc
    APIGW --> OrderSvc
    APIGW --> ProductSvc
    
    UserSvc --> UserDB
    OrderSvc --> OrderDB
    ProductSvc --> ProductDB
    
    UserSvc --> Cache
    OrderSvc --> Cache
    ProductSvc --> Cache
    
    OrderSvc --> Queue
    PaymentSvc --> Queue
    NotifSvc --> Queue
    
    PaymentSvc --> PayGW
    NotifSvc --> Email
    NotifSvc --> SMS
    
    style Client fill:#3b82f6,color:#fff
    style Gateway fill:#10b981,color:#fff
    style Services fill:#8b5cf6,color:#fff
    style Data fill:#f59e0b,color:#fff
    style External fill:#ef4444,color:#fff
```

### Database Schema
Core entities and relationships.

```mermaid
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    USER ||--|| PROFILE : has
    USER ||--o{ REVIEW : writes
    
    ORDER ||--|{ ORDER_ITEM : contains
    ORDER ||--|| PAYMENT : requires
    ORDER ||--o| SHIPPING : has
    
    PRODUCT ||--o{ ORDER_ITEM : ordered_in
    PRODUCT ||--o{ REVIEW : has
    PRODUCT }o--|| CATEGORY : belongs_to
    PRODUCT ||--o{ INVENTORY : tracked_in
    
    USER {
        uuid id PK
        string email UK
        string password_hash
        timestamp created_at
    }
    
    PROFILE {
        uuid id PK
        uuid user_id FK
        string first_name
        string last_name
        string phone
    }
    
    ORDER {
        uuid id PK
        uuid user_id FK
        string status
        decimal total
        timestamp created_at
    }
    
    ORDER_ITEM {
        uuid id PK
        uuid order_id FK
        uuid product_id FK
        integer quantity
        decimal price
    }
    
    PRODUCT {
        uuid id PK
        string name
        text description
        decimal price
        uuid category_id FK
    }
    
    CATEGORY {
        uuid id PK
        string name
        string slug UK
    }
    
    PAYMENT {
        uuid id PK
        uuid order_id FK
        decimal amount
        string status
        timestamp processed_at
    }
    
    SHIPPING {
        uuid id PK
        uuid order_id FK
        string tracking_number
        timestamp shipped_at
    }
    
    REVIEW {
        uuid id PK
        uuid user_id FK
        uuid product_id FK
        integer rating
        text comment
    }
    
    INVENTORY {
        uuid id PK
        uuid product_id FK
        integer quantity
        string location
    }
```

### Component Architecture
Domain model class structure.

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class AbstractEntity {
        <<abstract>>
        +UUID id
        +DateTime createdAt
        +DateTime updatedAt
        +validate()
    }
    
    class User {
        +String email
        +String passwordHash
        +String role
        +authenticate(password)
        +updatePassword(newPassword)
    }
    
    class Order {
        +UUID userId
        +OrderStatus status
        +Decimal total
        +calculateTotal()
        +updateStatus(status)
        +cancel()
    }
    
    class OrderItem {
        +UUID orderId
        +UUID productId
        +Integer quantity
        +Decimal price
        +getSubtotal()
    }
    
    class Product {
        +String name
        +String description
        +Decimal price
        +Integer stock
        +updateStock(quantity)
        +isAvailable()
    }
    
    class Payment {
        +UUID orderId
        +Decimal amount
        +PaymentMethod method
        +PaymentStatus status
        +process()
        +refund()
    }
    
    AbstractEntity <|-- User
    AbstractEntity <|-- Order
    AbstractEntity <|-- OrderItem
    AbstractEntity <|-- Product
    AbstractEntity <|-- Payment
    
    User "1" *-- "*" Order
    Order "1" *-- "*" OrderItem
    OrderItem "*" --> "1" Product
    Order "1" -- "1" Payment
```

### Order Processing Sequence
Complete flow from order placement to delivery.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Customer
    participant Web
    participant API
    participant OrderSvc
    participant InventorySvc
    participant PaymentSvc
    participant ShippingSvc
    participant NotificationSvc
    
    Customer->>Web: Browse & Add to Cart
    Customer->>Web: Checkout
    Web->>API: POST /orders
    API->>OrderSvc: Create Order
    
    OrderSvc->>InventorySvc: Check Stock
    alt Stock Available
        InventorySvc-->>OrderSvc: Confirmed
        OrderSvc->>PaymentSvc: Process Payment
        
        alt Payment Success
            PaymentSvc-->>OrderSvc: Payment Approved
            OrderSvc->>InventorySvc: Reserve Items
            InventorySvc-->>OrderSvc: Items Reserved
            OrderSvc->>ShippingSvc: Create Shipment
            ShippingSvc-->>OrderSvc: Shipment Created
            OrderSvc-->>API: Order Success
            API-->>Web: 201 Created
            Web-->>Customer: Order Confirmation
            
            par Async Notifications
                OrderSvc->>NotificationSvc: Send Email
                NotificationSvc-->>Customer: Confirmation Email
            and
                ShippingSvc->>NotificationSvc: Tracking Info
                NotificationSvc-->>Customer: Tracking Email
            end
            
            ShippingSvc->>ShippingSvc: Dispatch Order
            ShippingSvc->>NotificationSvc: Delivery Update
            NotificationSvc-->>Customer: Out for Delivery
            
        else Payment Failed
            PaymentSvc-->>OrderSvc: Payment Declined
            OrderSvc-->>API: Payment Error
            API-->>Web: 402 Payment Required
            Web-->>Customer: Payment Failed
        end
        
    else Out of Stock
        InventorySvc-->>OrderSvc: Insufficient Stock
        OrderSvc-->>API: Stock Error
        API-->>Web: 409 Conflict
        Web-->>Customer: Item Unavailable
    end
```

### User Registration Flow
Account creation with email verification.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([User Visits Site]) --> ShowForm[Show Registration Form]
    ShowForm --> EnterDetails[User Enters Details]
    EnterDetails --> Validate{Validate Input}
    
    Validate -->|Invalid| ShowError[Show Validation Errors]
    ShowError --> EnterDetails
    
    Validate -->|Valid| CheckEmail{Email Exists?}
    CheckEmail -->|Yes| EmailTaken[Email Already Registered]
    EmailTaken --> EnterDetails
    
    CheckEmail -->|No| CreateUser[Create User Account]
    CreateUser --> HashPassword[Hash Password]
    HashPassword --> SaveDB[(Save to Database)]
    SaveDB --> GenerateToken[Generate Verification Token]
    GenerateToken --> SendEmail[Send Verification Email]
    SendEmail --> ShowSuccess[Show Success Message]
    
    ShowSuccess --> UserChecksEmail[User Checks Email]
    UserChecksEmail --> ClickLink[Click Verification Link]
    ClickLink --> VerifyToken{Token Valid?}
    
    VerifyToken -->|Invalid| TokenError[Show Error - Request New]
    TokenError --> ResendEmail[Resend Verification]
    ResendEmail --> SendEmail
    
    VerifyToken -->|Expired| TokenExpired[Token Expired]
    TokenExpired --> ResendEmail
    
    VerifyToken -->|Valid| MarkVerified[Mark Email Verified]
    MarkVerified --> UpdateDB[(Update Database)]
    UpdateDB --> AutoLogin[Auto Login User]
    AutoLogin --> CreateSession[Create Session]
    CreateSession --> Welcome[Show Welcome Page]
    Welcome --> End([Registration Complete])
    
    style Start fill:#10b981
    style End fill:#10b981
    style ShowError fill:#ef4444
    style EmailTaken fill:#ef4444
    style TokenError fill:#ef4444
    style TokenExpired fill:#f59e0b
    style CreateUser fill:#3b82f6
    style MarkVerified fill:#3b82f6
```

### Order State Machine
All possible order states and transitions.

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Created: New Order
    
    Created --> AwaitingPayment: Payment Initiated
    Created --> Cancelled: Customer Cancels
    
    AwaitingPayment --> PaymentFailed: Payment Declined
    AwaitingPayment --> Paid: Payment Success
    
    PaymentFailed --> AwaitingPayment: Retry Payment
    PaymentFailed --> Cancelled: Too Many Failures
    
    Paid --> Processing: Start Processing
    
    Processing --> OnHold: Issue Detected
    Processing --> ReadyToShip: Processing Complete
    
    OnHold --> Processing: Issue Resolved
    OnHold --> Cancelled: Cannot Fulfill
    
    ReadyToShip --> Shipped: Dispatched
    
    Shipped --> InTransit: Carrier Pickup
    
    InTransit --> Delivered: Customer Received
    InTransit --> DeliveryFailed: Delivery Attempt Failed
    
    DeliveryFailed --> InTransit: Reattempt Delivery
    DeliveryFailed --> ReturnToSender: Max Attempts
    
    Delivered --> Completed: No Issues (7 days)
    Delivered --> ReturnInitiated: Customer Return Request
    
    ReturnInitiated --> Returning: Return Approved
    ReturnInitiated --> Completed: Return Denied
    
    Returning --> Returned: Return Received
    
    Returned --> Refunded: Refund Processed
    
    ReturnToSender --> Refunded: Return Processed
    
    Cancelled --> [*]
    Completed --> [*]
    Refunded --> [*]
    
    note right of AwaitingPayment
        15 minute timeout
        for payment completion
    end note
    
    note right of Delivered
        7 day waiting period
        before auto-complete
    end note
```

### Multi-Channel Performance
Sales and engagement across different channels.

### Customer Retention Analysis
Monthly cohort retention rates.
This tab demonstrates mixing charts and diagrams in a single view for comprehensive documentation.

#### Sprint Progress

**Sprint 12 Status**

Velocity and completion tracking.

#### Task Workflow

**Development Process**

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Backlog[Backlog] --> Todo[To Do]
    Todo --> InDev[In Development]
    InDev --> Review[Code Review]
    Review --> Testing[Testing]
    Testing --> Done[Done]
    
    Review -->|Changes| InDev
    Testing -->|Bugs| InDev
    
    style Backlog fill:#e5e7eb
    style Todo fill:#fbbf24
    style InDev fill:#3b82f6
    style Review fill:#8b5cf6
    style Testing fill:#f59e0b
    style Done fill:#10b981
```

#### CI/CD Process Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Dev["Development"]
        Code[Write Code] --> Commit[Git Commit]
        Commit --> Push[Git Push]
    end
    
    subgraph CI["Continuous Integration"]
        Push --> Trigger[Trigger Pipeline]
        Trigger --> Build[Build]
        Build --> UnitTest[Unit Tests]
        UnitTest --> Lint[Linting]
        Lint --> Scan[Security Scan]
    end
    
    subgraph CD["Continuous Deployment"]
        Scan --> Stage{Deploy to Staging}
        Stage --> IntTest[Integration Tests]
        IntTest --> E2ETest[E2E Tests]
        E2ETest --> Approve{Manual Approval}
        Approve -->|Yes| Prod[Deploy to Production]
        Approve -->|No| Stop[Stop]
    end
    
    Prod --> Monitor[Monitor]
    Monitor --> Success{Healthy?}
    Success -->|No| Rollback[Rollback]
    Success -->|Yes| Complete([Complete])
    
    style Code fill:#3b82f6
    style Build fill:#8b5cf6
    style Prod fill:#10b981
    style Rollback fill:#ef4444
    style Complete fill:#10b981
```

#### Build Success Rate

Pipeline performance metrics.

## Complete Feature Summary

This showcase demonstrates:
- **Nested Tabs**: Organize content into logical sections
- **Mixed Content**: Charts and diagrams in same view
- **Grid Layouts**: Responsive multi-column layouts
- **Real-world Scenarios**: Practical business and technical examples
- **Interactive Charts**: Full Chart.js functionality
- **Technical Diagrams**: Complete Mermaid diagram support
- **Card Components**: Organized, styled containers
- **Markdown Integration**: Rich text with embedded diagrams

All features work seamlessly together for comprehensive data visualization and technical documentation.
